loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing live operational vitals (power, frequency, current, voltage) — runtime, service intervals, and availability counters are not measured by this asset's meter.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing total active power as a proxy for runtime and load — per-phase power and start counts aren't measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active energy, reactive energy, and apparent power as proxies for energy metrics; MTBF and availability fractions are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active, reactive, demand, and apparent energy metrics — autonomy, backup time, load pressure, and headroom scores are not measured by this meter.
